name: Demurrage decay - stale balance adjustment
description: Tests pathfinder handling of demurrage-adjusted balances. Circles V2 tokens have a 7% annual demurrage rate causing balances to decay over time. This scenario verifies the pathfinder correctly calculates capacity with time-decayed balances rather than raw stored values.
notes: Demurrage causes ~7%/year token decay. The pathfinder must use demurrage-adjusted balances when computing capacity. At block 44289365, balances are already decayed from their original mint amounts. This tests that path computation uses realistic capacity values.
